title: CordMod
description: A simple mod for saving cordinates
body:
![CordMod commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07da4724b444c85b6b483125ff90411160283034_0.webp)
## Info
### Command list
- /cords save <markname> - Save a new mark with the location we are in.
- /cords list - Show list of all marks.
- /cords remove <markname> - Delete a mark with a unique name.
- /cords help - Show list of all mod commands.

### Features
- Different markers are used for each dimension.
- Different markers are used for each world.
- You can download all the labels of the world at any time (also for each dimension separately). 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Location of world marks files: ..\saves\<World Name>\cordsmod_marks\<overworld; the_nether; the_end>.json

</details>
